entity.label: Jehoiarib
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Jehovah defends, a priest at Jerusalem, head of one of the sacerdotal courses (1 Chr. 9:10; 24:7). His “course” went up from Babylon after the Exile (Ezra 2:36-39; Neh. 7:39-42).

nodes.label: Jehoiarib
nodes.description: Jehovah defends, a priest at Jerusalem, head of one of the sacerdotal courses (1 Chr. 9:10; 24:7). His “course” went up from Babylon after the Exile (Ezra 2:36-39; Neh. 7:39-42).

verses.text: Now the first lot came forth to Jehoiarib, the second to Jedaiah,
